Committee demo: branded website front-end for the 15th Annual Marlin Slam, designed to sit alongside a Google Form / Google Sheet back-end.

Website Demo – How it Works

Date: 25 April 2026
Venue: Eden Island Marina
Registration Fee: SCR 5,000 / boat
Registration Deadline: 24 April 2026, 6:00 PM
1
Visitor opens the registration link
They see the event branding, key dates, and a rules button.
2
Team enters its details
Captain, skipper, boat name, registration number, anglers, and emergency/fishing-area note.
3
Rules & waiver are acknowledged
Required before the form can be submitted.
4
Submission goes to the admin list
In the live version, this would feed Google Forms / Google Sheets instantly.
Download Rules PDF
Demo only: this would now appear in the Google Sheet dashboard for the committee to review.

Hot Chart / Dashboard Option

Best operational setup
Use the website for branding and public presentation, but let a Google Form / Google Sheet handle the actual submissions and dashboard.
Total Boats3
Paid2
Unpaid1
Approved1
Live progress bar
Example committee view: 68% of registered teams are already marked paid.
What the hot chart can show
  • Paid vs unpaid teams
  • Approved vs pending reviews
  • Entries by fishing area or marina
  • Total boats registered over time
Recommendation
Launch the Google Sheet dashboard first. Keep this branded website as the front-end or committee presentation mockup.
Built from the event details in your poster and rules pack. Demo only — no payment link included yet.
